content.en:
After entering the Void Fang Holy Gate, it is considered to be an entry.

The disciples of the Void Fang Holy Gate are divided into ordinary disciples, elite disciples, core disciples, true transmission disciples, and holy sons.

At the same time, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has one hundred and eight veins, each vein has elders and deacons, and the vein master of each vein is a five-fold ancestor, the elder must be a half-step five-fold ancestor, and if you want to serve as a deacon, you must have the realm of the peak of the fourfold ancestor.

As for the Fourfold Ancestor, if he didn't have special treatment, he might still just be a core disciple, a true disciple, or a holy son.

Of course, there are some sons who are no less important than elders.

Basically, disciples like them who are just starting out can only start from ordinary disciples or elite disciples, and only demonic geniuses can ascend to the sky in one step to become core disciples or true disciples.

As for becoming a Son, nothing like this has ever happened.

And after Ye Tian entered the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he was quickly called to the Void Tooth Hall by a Quadruple Ancestor.

"You are the Endless Ancestor!"

The eyes of the half-step fivefold ancestors looked at Ye Tian, they were all elders from the many veins of the Void Tooth Holy Sect.

"You have comprehended seventy-two extreme extremes?"

This time it was an elder from the main vein of the Void Tooth Hall who spoke, the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, the Fengming Origin Ancestor!

Feng Ming's original ancestor was a female ancestor, but her strength was very terrifying, and she was also the only fifth-fold ancestor among so many elders.

Originally, recruiting a disciple did not require her to appear, but Ye Tian was qualified.

"Hello elders, the disciple has indeed comprehended the seventy-two extreme extreme paths!"

Saying that, Ye Tian showed seventy-two extreme extreme paths.

At this moment, these elders were really moved, and knowing that it was a completely different feeling from seeing it!

At this time, Elder Feng Ming said again, "Have you engraved the seventy-two extreme extreme paths?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded again.

However, he didn't summon his Will Pagoda, otherwise he wouldn't have been able to hide the secret of his possession of the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda.

"Do you know the number of Holy Sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate?" Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said.

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "The disciple doesn't know. "

Feng Ming Origin Ancestor introduced: "There are a total of one hundred and eight veins in the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and each vein has a Holy Son quota, whether it is a Triple Origin Ancestor Holy Son or a Quadruple Origin Ancestor Holy Son, it can only be counted as one place. Unless the Holy Son is promoted to a half-step fivefold ancestor and becomes an elder, this place will be vacant. At present, only thirty-two of the one hundred and eight veins have empty slots, while the main vein can have ten slots of slots, but these ten slots of syrups are full. At the moment, you have two options. The first choice is to directly choose one of the thirty-two veins, as long as you break through the first layer of the Holy Son Tower, you will be considered a Holy Son. The second option is that you choose a different line, but you need to defeat the Son of the other lineage and replace it. "

"Elder, which vein has the best treatment?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The main vein!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said.

The main vein is the most powerful, and it has the most fivefold ancestors, while the other veins almost only have one or two fivefold ancestors.

Ye Tian thought about it, what he needed most was a backer, and the backer of the main vein was strong enough, and the foundation of the other veins was not good, and it was meaningless to become the holy son of the other veins.

So, Ye Tian said directly: "I want to join the main vein and challenge one of the Triple Origin Ancestors Holy Son of the main vein." "

"Good!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor agreed.

At this time, the elders of the other veins were a little displeased, especially those elders of those veins who did not have the Holy Son, and they snorted coldly, feeling that Ye Tian was overwhelmed.

The main vein is indeed very good, but it has become the triple ancestor of the Holy Son of the main vein, can the combat effectiveness be weak?

A guy who has just come up from the Quadruple Heavenly Gate still wants to become the Holy Son of the main line?

"Of the ten Holy Sons of the main lineage, six of them are Fourfold Ancestors, and only four are Triple Ancestors, this is the information of the four of them, you choose one of them!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor waved his hand, and four pieces of information appeared.

Soon, Ye Tian locked on one of the Triple Ancestor Holy Sons.

"Ice Feather Ancestor, the peak cultivation of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, comprehending the seventy-two kinds of extreme extreme paths, having the body of the original ancestor of the Prison Suppression, the Will Pagoda is suspected to be one hundred and eight layers, and the seventy-two kinds of extreme extreme paths are inscribed, the details are unknown. "

The reason why Ye Tian chose him was because his name was in the last place, perhaps intentionally or unintentionally, but this also showed that the strength of this Holy Son should be the weakest one in the main lineage.

"Okay, you'll need to challenge the Ice Feather Ancestor after a Native Day. If you fail the challenge, you will not be eligible to choose which lineage to become the Holy Son, if there are other lineages that want you, you can only become the Holy Son, if there is no lineage that wants you, you can only become a true disciple first, this is the rule. Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor reminded.

"Disciple understands!"

Ye Tianying said.

He then left the place, just waiting for the challenge to begin.

......

The Void Tooth Holy Gate, the main vein.

Ice Feather Ancestor was extremely angry, he was actually challenged by a guy who was just getting started.

"Look for the dead guy!"

Although he is the weakest Son of the main lineage, he is also more powerful than many Sons of the other lineages!

Moreover, he had now comprehended seventy-five extreme extreme paths, and although there was no hope for comprehending one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, each more extreme extreme path would have a little more potential in the future.

Therefore, he has not been promoted to the Quadruple Origin Ancestor, otherwise with his background, he would have already impacted the Quadruple Origin Ancestor realm.

"Endless Origin Ancestor, after a Origin Day, I will defeat you fiercely!"

Ice Feather Ancestor said coldly.

Soon, the news of the Endless Origin Ancestor challenging the Main Lineage Holy Son Bing Yu Origin Ancestor spread, and many Holy Sons and True Disciples were ready to come and see the excitement when the time came.

In the blink of an eye, a day of the original domain passed.

Main vein.

Ye Tian and Ice Feather Ancestor came here.

At this time, Feng Ming's original ancestor waved his hand, and a ball turned into a world, which was incomparably solid and infinitely wide.

"You enter this world to fight, this bead is a primordial holy soldier, you can't break it!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said.

Ye Tian and Ice Feather Ancestor nodded, and entered the world inside this bead.

The battle is on the verge of breaking out.

"Endless Ancestor, I heard that you have ascended from the Voidless Heavenly Gate, you should choose one vein to become the Holy Son at will, you should not come to snatch my position, I will defeat you as quickly as possible, so that the other veins know that you are too spicy chicken, so that you don't want you, and then you will not even have any hope of becoming a Holy Son!"

"Now that we're done, let's get started!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Holy Arts—Ice Glass Light!"

Ice Feather Ancestor directly sacrificed this holy art.

The onlookers were shocked.

"Ice Feather Ancestor has actually practiced this holy art!"

"It's normal, after all, it's the Holy Son, and the treatment he has is different, it's not difficult to get together the conditions for the light of the ice glass!"

"It's a pity, I'm afraid this Endless Origin Ancestor can't stop the Holy Arts, the power of the Holy Arts is too terrifying!"

Many Origin Ancestors thought that Ye Tian couldn't stop it, but in fact, even if he didn't use Holy Arts, he could easily block such a weak ordinary Holy Technique with his own strength.

But he is still not so high-profile, so let's use holy magic to resist holy art!

Airplanes!

A glazed holy cover appeared on Ye Tian's body, directly resisting the light of the ice glass.

The next moment.

Ye Tian directly used the top primordial control technique, the Void Blade!
